title: Test proposal: create blank file in src/ for flow validation
summary: This is a no-op test proposal to validate the proposal approval/execution pipeline by creating a blank placeholder file under src/.
details:
## Purpose
Create a minimal, blank file in `src/` purely to test the proposal flow end-to-end.

## Proposed change
- Create an empty file: `src/test-proposal-blank-file.txt`
- No code paths, runtime behavior, or configs are affected.

## Why
User requested a test proposal to verify approval and execution mechanics.

affectedFiles.description: Empty placeholder file used only for proposal flow testing

estimatedImpact: No functional impact. Verifies proposal workflow and executor path.
executorPrompt: Execute the approved proposal exactly: create a new blank file at `src/test-proposal-blank-file.txt` with no content. Do not modify any other files. Report completion.
